name: git-ui-pro
description: 中文桌面 Git 可视化管理软件

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n renderer,electron-ts,electron -c cyan,magenta,green "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "tsc -p electron/tsconfig.json --watch --preserveWatchOutput" "wait-on dist-electron/main.js http://127.0.0.1:5173 && cross-env VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.build: npm run build:electron && npm run build:renderer
